debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB'' < D

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  refine lt_iff_le_and_ne.mpr ⟨refinement_le B hB hB' hB'', fun h_eq => ?_⟩
  rcases H with ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩
  apply h_ne
  have h_sub : B N hN ⊆ D := fun x hx => by
    have : x ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := by simp only [Set.mem_iUnion]; use N, hN
    rwa [h_eq] at this
  have h_all : ∀ x ∈ B N hN, x = N := fun x hx => by
    have hxle : x ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hx
    by_contra h_xne
    exact hB'' N hN ((D.sSupIndep.pair_disjoint (h_sub hx) hN h_xne).eq_bot_of_le hxle ▸ hx)
  have h_none : (B N hN).Nonempty := by
    by_contra h_emp
    have : N = ⊥ := hB N hN ▸ (Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h_emp ▸ sSup_empty)
    exact D.not_bot_mem (this ▸ hN)
  rcases h_none with ⟨x, hx⟩
  have hxN : x = N := h_all x hx
  exact Set.eq_singleton_iff_unique_mem.mpr ⟨hxN ▸ hx, h_all⟩
